# Hakan Leonardo

Hakan Leonardo is a public business and services website for practical AI systems.

Production URL fallback: https://hakanleonardo.com
Default language: Turkish
Secondary language: English

Primary services:
- AI customer representative + website
- AI sales and proposal assistant
- AI operations automation

Primary routes:
- / — Turkish homepage
- /en — English homepage
- /vizyon — Turkish vision page
- /en/vision — English vision page
- /manifesto — redirects to /vizyon
- /en/manifesto — redirects to /en/vision

Who it helps:
Hakan Leonardo helps businesses, agencies, founders, and professional service providers clarify how AI can improve customer communication, sales/proposal workflows, and recurring operations.

What it builds:
Hakan Leonardo designs practical, bounded AI business systems. The current MVP includes a deterministic AI discovery assistant and lead capture form. It is not a broad platform, agent operating system, or software factory.

Share preview:
- Site name: Hakan Leonardo
- Primary title: Hakan Leonardo | Yapay Zekâ İş Sistemleri
- Primary description: AI customer representative, sales/proposal assistant, and operations automation for businesses.
- OG image: /og/hakan-leonardo-og.png

Important scope note:
Leonardo Tales Core, Dev, Science, agent OS, and software factory projects are not active products of this public website. They should be treated as future/separate repository work, not as claims made by this site.
